nasb.text: He who trusts in his riches will fall, But the righteous will flourish like the green leaf.

esv.text: Whoever trusts in his riches will fall, but the righteous will flourish like a green leaf.

cnv.text: 倚賴自己財富的，必然衰落； 義人卻必繁茂，好像綠葉。

ccb.text: 倚仗财势者必衰败， 义人必兴旺如绿叶。

csbs.text: 依靠自己财富的必将倒下； 而义人却像绿叶那样茂盛。
